title: Polish slide toolbar controls — layout swapper + theme toggle
description: The slide type dropdown (layout swapper) and the Dark/Light theme toggle buttons in the slide preview toolbar don't look polished or button-like. They need visual treatment to feel like intentional UI controls rather than unstyled defaults. Should match the overall design quality of the slide themes themselves.
acceptance_criteria: Theme toggle buttons look like proper toggle/segmented control — clear active state, hover state, visual weight
Slide type dropdown looks styled and intentional, not like a raw HTML select
Both controls are visually cohesive with each other and the toolbar
Controls work correctly on both themes
notes: Depends on TASK-023 merging first since it introduces the theme toggle. The layout swapper dropdown already exists but is unstyled.
